div.p: A mind that inhabits screens Imagination-first visual computer-use agent
AFFORDANCES Elements as action potentials "What can I DO here?"
PLANNER Spreading activation Goal → relevant actions
MOTOR SYSTEM Bezier mouse · Gaussian typing Momentum scroll · Human-like
SQLite Graph Site patterns · Causal edges Spreading activation Reconsolidation on surprise
IMAGINE Generate expected state "What should this page look like?"
DIFF Prediction error imagination vs reality
VISUAL CORTEX Screenshot + SoM Layout, colors, spatial
ANALYTICAL CORTEX DOM / a11y / macOS AX Structure, state, handlers
RECONCILER Merge dual views Disagreement = information
ALIGNMENT CRITIC Haiku on every action "Does this serve the intent?"
SECURITY MEMBRANE Content isolation HTTP sandbox Credential vault
